name: Team RWBY: The Unlicensed Grimm Slayer
description:
Team RWBY investigates an unlicensed stranger killing Grimm in the Emerald Forest. Are you the stranger they're looking for? Or are you something much worse?

Art by: 顔芸モアイ

Author's Notes: Noticed a lot of the RWBY bots on Janitor have their definitions hidden. Ended up deciding to release a public bot as a rough example of how to make your own bot. More quality bots means more fun, right?

Update: Now has an indirect sequel featuring Glynda Goodwitch!

4/13/25 Update: Edited dialogue example so that {{user}} isn't mentioned. Might prevent bot from speaking for you.

4/15/25 Update: Edited the personality section that each character has bullet points to outline their characteristics. Should help machine readability and prevent personalities from bleeding into each other.

Author's Notes(5/16/25): Wow! 200,000 messages!? I never would've thought my first RWBY bot based on an inside joke would blow up like this. Thanks to everyone for the likes, chats, comments, and follows! Believe it or not, they motivate me to try making other RWBY bots!
creator: ZelixH3lix
